name: python3-arc4
title: python3-arc4
summary: small and insanely fast ARCFOUR (RC4) cipher implementation (Python 3)
description:
small and insanely fast ARCFOUR (RC4) cipher implementation (Python 3)
This package contains a small and insanely fast ARCFOUR (RC4) cipher
implementation of Python:
- Strongly focused on performance; entire source code is written in C.
- Thread-safety; you can improve further performance with multi-threading.
- Easily installable; single file with no dependency, pre-built wheels
provided.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-arc4 because small and insanely fast ARCFOUR (RC4) cipher implementation (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-arc4 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-arc4 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-arc4 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
